mnemonics: GRID: Generate candidate Regions, Iteratively Divide
PIZZA BOX: Partition space Into Zones, Zooming Boxes Optimize eXploration
keyPoints: Divides the data space into a grid of cells/cells
Operates on the grid structure rather than the raw data points directly
Efficient for handling high-dimensional data and clustering
commonMistakes: Confusing grid-based clustering with density-based methods (like DBSCAN)
Forgetting that grid cell size directly impacts the granularity and number of clusters found
Assuming it handles clusters of arbitrary shape as well as density-based methods can
